changes: iter5: Fix 3 explorer bugs (70% experiments were crashing)
iter6: Fix checkpoint override (DQN getting PPO checkpoints)
iter7: Quadratic reward scaling (level^2 completion + survival)
Level input cap: .min(10)/10 -> .min(20)/20 in Rust and Python state
Danger signal uncapped: .min(9) -> .min(20) in proximity penalty
PPO bias: explorer now picks PPO 70% of time (was 50%)
Fix ParallelGameEnv -> BatchedGames import (PPO checkpoint validation was crashing)
Build and pass PPOConfig from experiment spec to train_ppo (PPO was ignoring all hyperparams)
Wrap PPO result parsing in try/except (errors were escaping with misleading messages)

Fix SIL crash: episode_rewards[i] -> ep_score in train_ppo.py line 952. Every PPO experiment crashed on first episode due to undefined variable in Self-Imitation Learning buffer code. This killed 100% of PPO experiments (172/455 total).

changes_made.description: Level cap .min(20), danger uncap, missile reward scaling
Fix PPO checkpoint state size validation (248 vs 276) and compute avg_level from logs
Fix PPO integration: BatchedGames import, pass PPOConfig from spec, wrap result parsing
Fix SIL crash: episode_rewards[i] -> ep_score (line 952). Every PPO experiment crashed on first episode.

successful_ideas: Quadratic reward scaling increased best score from 65K to 94K
Extended training (20K) doubled avg score from 17K to 34K
Bug fixes tripled effective experiment throughput
known_bottlenecks: PPO was 100% broken - now fixed, should unlock level 9+ progression
State representation missing enemy_fire_rate, kamikaze_timing, bounce_urgency (7 features)
DQN plateaus at level 6-8 regardless of hyperparameters - PPO+GRU is the path to level 15
Old PPO checkpoint (model_ppo_best_avg.pt) has wrong state size (248 vs 276) - from_best PPO experiments fall back to from_scratch
PPO from_scratch experiments need enough episodes (25K+) to match DQN performance
